truthful_notice: This projection combines the latest persisted Site runtime evidence with verified destination-owned evidence records. Site runtime remains blocked until a new cadence-policy-aware PASS is persisted; LLM-adapter and Triage outcomes are machine-produced and fail closed.

nodes.title: Public ecosystem truth cycle
nodes.current_step: Inventory, evidence inspection, classification, remediation planning, and destination-owned evidence projection continue on scheduled repository workflows.

nodes.title: Enumerate public ecosystem repositories
nodes.result: Latest persisted cycle enumerated 72 public repositories across 8 configured organizations.

nodes.title: Inspect public objective and runtime evidence
nodes.result: Strict evidence inspection is active; one repository currently satisfies strict operational completion evidence.

nodes.title: Classify public repository integrity
nodes.result: Fail-closed outcome classifications are applied; unknown, pending, workflow-only, and unit-test-only evidence do not count as operational completion.

nodes.title: Generate public remediation queue
nodes.result: Latest persisted inventory generated 71 machine-owned repository actions.

nodes.title: Execute bounded Site remediation
nodes.result: Site-owned controls execute under deny-by-default mutation authority; cross-repository mutations remain destination-owned.

nodes.title: Unify runtime freshness source of truth
nodes.result: The bounded dispatcher now reads canonical data/autonomy/freshness-policy.json and can no longer restore the obsolete hard-coded 90-minute threshold.

nodes.title: Verify public Site runtime after repair
nodes.current_step: The repair is installed, but the latest persisted runtime receipt still reports 6 of 7 checks passing with freshness failed. Awaiting a new workflow-produced cadence-policy-aware result.

nodes.title: Dispatch destination-owned repository runners
nodes.current_step: Two destination-owned runners have executed; remaining repositories require their own bounded workflows and evidence projections.

nodes.title: Project LLM-adapter operational evidence
nodes.result: Destination-owned projection executed and persisted BLOCKED with 11 unmet gates, including gateway health, provider use, durable storage, custody, reconstructability, immutable verified receipt, and destination activation state.

nodes.title: Project Triage implementation evidence
nodes.result: Destination-owned workflow passed implementation checks and persisted fail-closed evidence. Remaining gates are observed user-facing execution, runtime observation, and user-visible outcome verification.

nodes.title: Apply public ecosystem completion gate
nodes.current_step: One of 72 public repositories satisfies strict operational completion evidence; two additional repositories now provide truthful destination-owned blocked or implementation-only projections.

corrective_actions.action: Run and persist the corrected cadence-policy-aware Site runtime verification
corrective_actions.reason: The code repair is installed, but no newer machine-produced PASS receipt has replaced the prior freshness failure.

corrective_actions.action: Satisfy LLM-adapter live provider, storage, custody, reconstructability, receipt, and destination-state gates through its repository-owned workflow
corrective_actions.reason: The destination-owned projection truthfully reports 11 critical blockers.

corrective_actions.action: Build and verify a bounded user-facing Triage execution surface
corrective_actions.reason: Implementation evidence passes, but user-facing runtime and outcome evidence do not yet exist.

corrective_actions.action: Install destination-owned bounded runners for remaining queued repositories
corrective_actions.reason: Two destination-owned runners have executed; the remainder are not yet covered.

completed_history.title: First destination-owned evidence cycle
completed_history.result: LLM-adapter and Triage each executed repository-owned evidence projections without converting incomplete evidence into completion.

completed_history.title: Public completion-integrity cycle
completed_history.result: Processed 72 public repositories and generated 71 actions.
